parameters.content:
## docs-chatbot chat
Chat trigger > agent > answers from your Supabase knowledge base.

Setup:
1. OpenRouter chat model: free account at openrouter.ai, make an API key, pick any model with :free in the name
2. Knowledge base node: same Supabase credential as the ingest workflow
3. Embeddings node: same free Gemini key
4. In the chat trigger options, set allowed origins to your website domain before going live (it ships as * for testing)

Test in the editor chat first. Then activate and put the snippet from embed-snippet.html on your site.

nodes.name: Chat trigger
nodes.notes: Change allowedOrigins from * to https://yourdomain.com before production

options.systemMessage: You answer questions using ONLY the knowledge_base tool. Search it before answering. If the answer isn't in the retrieved content, say you don't know and suggest contacting support. Keep answers short and practical. Don't make things up.

nodes.name: OpenRouter model
nodes.notes: Pick any :free model with tool calling. Skip gemma (no tool calling) and reasoning models (slow). Swap freely if rate limited

nodes.name: Memory
nodes.notes: In-memory, resets when n8n restarts. Swap for Postgres Chat Memory (your Supabase db works) if you need persistence

parameters.toolDescription: Searches the documentation and FAQs. Use this for every user question.

nodes.name: Gemini embeddings
nodes.notes: Free Gemini key. 3072 dimensions, matches the SQL setup. Must be the same model in both workflows
